##NAMES=Coquimbite
##RRUFFID=R110210
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=AlFe_3_(SO_4_)_6_(H_2_O)_12_·6H_2_O
##LOCALITY=Mina Alcaparrosa, Cerritos Bayos, Calama, Atacama, II Region, Chile
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Gunnar Farber
##DESCRIPTION=Purple hexagonal prisms with incomplete pyramidal terminations, associated with pertlikite R110209 and krausite R110211
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction

##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
